title: EntityField

name.description: Dot-separated field name path within the schema (e.g., 'patient.dateOfBirth').

nullable.description: Whether this field permits null values.

validValues.description: Constraint on acceptable values (enumeration, range, or regex).

tags.description: Semantic classification tags applied to this field.

glossaryTerms.description: URNs of GlossaryTerms that define the business meaning of this field.

description: A single named field within a SchemaDefinition, specifying its data type, nullability, valid-value constraints, semantic tag assignments, and linked glossary terms.
